block_00: Billing Error: Your payment was declined
block_01: It looks like we can’t process your payment. There are different reasons for billing errors. Below are the most common:
block_02: Insufficient funds in your bank account. Check if you correctly calculated the USD amount in your currency. We recommend having a little more money in your account than you need just in case.
block_03: Unauthorized transaction. Contact your bank to find out if 3D secure transactions are enabled.
block_04: The payment details were incorrect. See if you entered the payment details correctly.
block_05: The time of the payment has expired. Retry the payment, and enter the 3D code in a timely manner.
block_06: The payment was declined by the bank. Contact your bank to learn the reason and fix it.
block_07: Your account has withdrawal limits for internet transactions. Use another payment method to circumvent it.
block_08: Check and see if your bank account and payment details are in order, or try another payment method.
